name: agentic-coding-fitness
description: A 20-skill curriculum-and-practice platform for building production agentic AI. Folds the Agentic Coding Fitness course (weeks 2–18) into teach → runnable code → guided-lab skills: the fundamentals (LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP & skills, RAG, multi-agent systems, knowledge-graph memory, production GraphRAG) PLUS the canonical 12-pattern taxonomy, production & observability, agent evaluation with CI gating, the NVIDIA NeMo Agent Toolkit, long-running & distributed agents (Google ADK durable sessions, pause/resume, auth.md credentials, A2A fleets), Week 18's production agent-loop engineering with the Claude Agent SDK, self-evolving agents with tripartite memory + consolidation, sovereign AI at the edge (local/on-device, $0-per-token), a drill library, the curriculum, vibe-coding & security, the A2A protocol, and the craft of authoring your own skills. Most skills point at real weekN/ code in this repo; a few (parts of the curriculum/vibe-coding) are honestly flagged as conceptual.

author.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar
